data.title: CT demands Robinhood, Crypto.com, Kalshi halt prediction markets, sent cease and desist letters for unlicensed sports betting.
data.description: The state of Connecticut has issued cease and desist letters to three platforms - Robinhood, Crypto.com, and Kalshi. Authorities allege that their event contracts constitute unlicensed sports betting. The letters were sent as part of regulatory measures, with the state cracking down on activities that are not appropriately licensed. This move comes amid heightened scrutiny of online platforms offering services related to financial trading, cryptocurrency, and event prediction markets. The platforms are now facing regulatory pressure in Connecticut, with the state taking action against what it perceives as violations of gambling laws. The companies have been instructed to cease operations related to event contracts until they obtain the necessary licensing to operate legally in the state. This development underscores the increasing regulatory challenges faced by online platforms in the financial and prediction markets.
Colliers Securities trims AvalonBay’s target price by $5 to $195 and assigns a Neutral rating.

data.title: Dogecoin's price jumps 2%, up 10% this week outperforming Bitcoin & XRP. Long positions rise, with futures open interest up by 1.91% in the last 24 hours, and Long/Short ratio on Binance increases from 2.13 to 2.56 signaling bullish interest.
data.description: Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) continued its upward trend on Wednesday amidst a general surge in the cryptocurrency market driven by positive macroeconomic factors. The popular dog-themed digital currency saw a 2% increase in value over the past 24 hours, contributing to a 10% rise for the week. Surprisingly, Dogecoin outperformed larger cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) in this period. The market reaction spurred speculative trading, leading to a 1.91% increase in open interest for DOGE futures within the same timeframe as reported by Coinglass. Moreover, the Long/Short ratio for Dogecoin on Binance climbed from 2.13 to 2.56, indicating a growing bullish sentiment among investors. For a more detailed analysis, the full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.
10-year Japanese government bond yield increases to 1.915%, up 2.5 basis points.

data.title: Bitcoin sees increased short positions before possible Fed rate cut; over $6B in leveraged positions in jeopardy.
data.description: With the Federal Reserve's upcoming rate decision, Bitcoin remains relatively stable, trading within a narrow range. However, over $6 billion worth of leveraged positions are currently at risk in the market.

data.title: UL Solutions Inc. priced its secondary public offering of 12.5M Class A common stock shares at $78 per share.
data.description: In Northbrook, Illinois, UL Solutions Inc. disclosed the pricing of its underwritten public offering (NYSE: ULS), consisting of 12,500,000 shares of its Class A common stock. Priced at $78.00 per share, the offering, solely comprising secondary shares, will be sold by UL Standards & Engagement, the selling stockholder. Additionally, the underwriters hold a 30-day option to secure up to an extra 1,875,000 shares of Class A common stock.

data.title: Ryobi Systems success in Bangladesh: 20% productivity boost, 30% methane reduction in sustainable farming project.
data.description: Ryobi Systems Co., Ltd., AJI-CLE Co., Ltd., ANTAR Society for Development, and UGI LTD., collaborated on a project in Bangladesh from February to December 2025. The initiative focused on enhancing agriculture efficiency and productivity through agricultural DX and generating carbon credits. The project results were shared with local government officials, including the Additional Secretary of the Ministry of Agriculture, on December 2, 2025.
HealthEquity Inc. sees its price target increased to $129 by J.P. Morgan, up from $126.
Scotiabank boosts Snowflake’s stock target from $280 to $290.
